category_sources: source_facts.description: library and tools for extracting the contents of Windows Registry hive files; official README says hivex reads and writes Windows Registry hive binary files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hivex; official libguestfs/hivex repository and manual use hivex.
docs_sources: Official libguestfs hivex manual page is the dedicated documentation surface linked from the official repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo was empty; official libguestfs/hivex repository is linked to the libguestfs site and describes the hivex library.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supports Windows Registry hive extraction; official repository README describes the C library, XML export tool, shell, and bindings.
